name: Alex Rivera
backstory: Alex discovered competitive gaming during college and dropped out junior year to pursue it full-time. After years of grinding through amateur tournaments and building a streaming audience, they finally broke into the pro scene. Now balances tournament play with content creation, building a community around positive gaming culture.

relationships.mentor: Coach Martinez - former pro who helped Alex develop discipline
relationships.rival: xXShadowKingXx - top-ranked player and tournament nemesis
relationships.best_friend: Jordan 'Pixel' Park - streaming partner and roommate
